description_long: This is a rugged, boxy SUV with a matte yellow exterior and black accents, designed for off-road and urban environments. The vehicle features four large, chunky tires with deep treads, suitable for rough terrain. On the roof, there is a prominent cargo box or storage container, adding to its utilitarian appearance. The front grille is protected by a sturdy bumper, and four round auxiliary lights are mounted above the windshield for enhanced visibility. The windows are tinted, and the SUV has four passenger-accessible doors, with visible handles and side mirrors. The overall design suggests durability and practicality, with a focus on adventure and utility.
description: A matte yellow, boxy SUV with a roof cargo box, chunky off-road tires, and black accents, built for rugged use. Features include four doors, auxiliary roof lights, and a sturdy front bumper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robust bumper, four round roof lights, and the wide, flat hood with black patches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the roof cargo box, four doors, large off-road tires, and side mirrors.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat back, rear window, and the continuation of the roof cargo box.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the doors, cargo box, and rugged tires.
attribute_wheel_design: Five thick, angular spokes with a matte black finish and deep off-road tread
